sources.title: AI in Insurance Market Size, Share | Industry Report, 2034
claims_supported: Global AI in insurance market projected to grow from $13.45B (2026) to $154.39B by 2034
CAGR of 35.7% during forecast period 2026–2034

sources.title: AI in Insurance Market Size, Share | CAGR of 32.7%
claims_supported: AI in insurance market valued at $2.74B in 2021
CAGR of 32.7% from 2024 to 2033

sources.title: AI-Powered Insurance Underwriting Market Size | CAGR of 44%
claims_supported: LLM-based agentic underwriting reduced hallucination rates from 11.3% to 3.8%
Underwriting decision accuracy improved from 92% to 96%

sources.title: Cyber Threats in AI Push US $1.63B Insurtech Funding
claims_supported: 95.2% of all insurtech funding in Q1 2026 directed toward AI-focused companies
Investment reached $1.63B in Q1 2026

sources.title: Lemonade AI Insurance: 3M+ Customers, $1.3B In-Force Premium by 2026
claims_supported: Lemonade in-force premium $1.3B and 3.1M+ customers by Q1 2026
Launched Tesla autonomous car insurance January 2026

sources.title: Lemonade Embraced AI in Claims From Inception
claims_supported: Lemonade surpassed $1B in-force premiums in March 2025
Net loss ratio improved to 75% (2025) from 97% (2022)
AI Jim settled claim in 2 seconds (world record)

sources.title: Shift Technology Revenue 2024: $82.6M ARR, $320M Raised
claims_supported: Shift Technology $82.6M ARR in 2024 (up from $62.1M in 2023)
$320M raised from 17 investors

sources.title: Shift Technology — Five-Year Renewal with AXA
claims_supported: Shift Technology renewed 5-year partnership with AXA in March 2026
Partnership spans 15 countries across Europe, Asia, and Latin America

sources.title: Insurance AI Pricing Under the EU AI Act and NAIC Bulletin
claims_supported: Life and health insurance pricing AI classified as high-risk under EU AI Act Annex III point 5(c)
EU AI Act obligations applying from August 2, 2026

sources.title: NAIC Intensifies AI Regulatory Focus: What Health Insurance Payors Need to Know
claims_supported: NAIC Model Bulletin adopted December 2023, incorporated by 25 US states
NAIC AI Evaluation Tool pilot running Jan–Sep 2026 in 12 states

sources.title: Insurity Survey: Declining Consumer Confidence in AI for P&C Insurance
claims_supported: 47% of consumers reported good AI interactions in 2025, down from 63% in 2024
Millennial positive sentiment toward AI in insurance fell from 41% (2024) to 26% (2025)

sources.title: 4 Ways Conversational AI Can Close the Millennial Insurance Gap
claims_supported: Only 10% of millennials have sufficient life insurance coverage
Millennials face friction and complexity as primary barriers to purchasing insurance

sources.title: AI in Insurance Market Key Players Analysis — Lemonade, Tractable, Shift Technology, ZhongAn, Metromile
claims_supported: Lemonade, Tractable, Shift Technology, ZhongAn as top AI insurance market players
North America holds highest market share

sources.title: Insurance 2030 — The Impact of AI on the Future of Insurance
claims_supported: AI enabling straight-through processing from 10–15% to 70–90%
Underwriting timelines collapsing from 3 days to 3 minutes

sources.title: Insurtech Trends 2026: How AI Is Transforming Claims and Underwriting
claims_supported: P&C insurtech funding surged 90% quarter-over-quarter in Q1 2025
Fraud detection improvement of 30%+ with AI systems

sources.title: Older Gen Zers Are Letting AI Pick Their Health Insurance Plan
claims_supported: Gen Z is using AI tools to select health insurance plans without brokers

notes: search_volume (~60,000) is approximate — composite estimate for 'AI insurance' + 'insurtech AI' keyword cluster; no direct search volume source available; marked as unverified.

growth_3m (+90% QoQ) reflects Q4 2024 → Q1 2025 P&C insurtech funding surge per Gallagher/Cybersecurity Magazine; used as proxy for recent market acceleration since market size quarterly figures unavailable.

ZhongAn market share (~15% Asia digital) is a segment estimate based on policy volume dominance in Asia-Pacific digital insurance, not total global AI insurance market; no precise third-party market share figure available.
Tractable $1B valuation is from 2021 Series D — no updated 2026 valuation publicly available.
Hippo Insurance market cap (~$800M) is approximate based on available 2025 reports.
